data.name: Sex Empire - Episode 1
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, and realistic-looking characters.

Welcome to SEX EMPIRE — where limits are made to be broken, and monogamy is more myth than rule. Indulge in this decadent new ROYAL FANTASY series and discover how far desire and power can truly go.


GAME DESCRIPTION


EPISODE 1

The court buzzes with anticipation as Prince Adrien of the West and his new bride, Liora, arrive at the Empyrean Palace for high-stakes trade negotiations. With a fleet unrivaled in strength, the Western Kingdom holds the key to expanding the Empire’s dominion across the seas.

The Emperor and Empress are eager to secure the alliance, but so are rival realms, each offering gold and whispered promises to sway the young prince. Yet the rulers of the East possess a far more seductive advantage: a lavish Palace where pleasure is power, love knows no bounds, and fidelity is little more than a myth.

To charm their guests, the Empress arranges a decadent welcome in the Royal Baths, hosted by the Emperor’s most favored Lady, a woman famed for her talent in satisfying even the deepest desires.

 
Will the Prince and Princess be tempted… or scandalized?

 

Dive into this decadent world of indulgence, intrigue, and forbidden delight, where alliances are forged as easily in bed as at the table.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
